title: Draft invoice line templates collection schema
description: A schema for retrieving a collection of draft invoices line templates.

collection.description: A collection of draft invoice line templates.

description.description: A description of the product or service sold.

product.description: The product or service offered on the invoice line.

productNumber.description: The unique product number. This can be a stock keeping unit identifier (SKU).

self.description: A unique reference to the product resource.
A unique reference to the draft invoice line template resource.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: The unique self reference of the draft invoice line templates collection.
